scripts.migrate:local: cd ./worker && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.migrate:staging: cd ./worker && wrangler d1 migrations apply logseq-sync-graph-meta-staging --env staging --remote
scripts.migrate:prod: cd ./worker && wrangler d1 migrations apply logseq-sync-graphs-prod --env prod --remote
scripts.build:api-docs: export COGNITO_ISSUER=https://cognito-idp.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/us-east-1_dtagLnju8 && clojure -M:cljs release db-sync-api-docs && node worker/dist/api-docs-spec.js && redocly build-docs worker/dist/openapi.json --output=worker/dist/api-docs.html --title="Logseq Server API" --disableGoogleFont && node worker/scripts/embed_api_docs.mjs
scripts.test:mcp: pnpm clean && pnpm release && pnpm build:api-docs && cd worker && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --dry-run --env=""
scripts.deploy-prod: export SENTRY_RELEASE=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && pnpm clean && pnpm release && pnpm build:api-docs && pnpm sentry:sourcemaps && cd ./worker && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --env prod
scripts.deploy-staging: export SENTRY_RELEASE=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && pnpm clean && pnpm release && pnpm build:api-docs && pnpm sentry:sourcemaps && cd ./worker && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --env staging
